task:
OBS Studio is open with a scene collection that already has a single scene named 'Live Stream' containing one Display Capture source named 'Screen'.

Add four more sources to the 'Live Stream' scene, each with these exact names and types:
- Video Capture Device named 'Camera'
- Text (FreeType 2) named 'Now Playing' (text content can be any value)
- Image named 'Channel Logo' with file path /home/user/Pictures/channel_logo.png
- Color Source named 'Lower Third BG'

All five sources (the original 'Screen' plus the four new ones) must be visible. Do NOT create or delete any scenes — the collection must still contain exactly 1 scene named 'Live Stream'. Persist the changes to the scene collection JSON.

verification.description: Original source 'Screen' still exists in 'Live Stream' scene
Source 'Now Playing' exists in 'Live Stream' scene
Source 'Channel Logo' exists in 'Live Stream' scene
Source 'Lower Third BG' exists in 'Live Stream' scene
